warnings:
Acumatica Payment.ApplicationHistory is not readable from the current Default endpoint, and the safe DocumentsToApply probe did not return historical application lines. Expose a Generic Inquiry or endpoint with payment type/ref, customer, applied invoice type/ref, amount applied, balance, project, and last modified timestamp, then wire payment_applications to that source. No AR payment application OData entity set was found. Set ACUMATICA_AR_PAYMENT_APPLICATIONS_ENTITY to the exposed GI name once it appears in metadata. Currently relevant OData entity sets: APBillsToPayments, BI-ARInvoices, CR-CampaignInvoices, DB-StorageDetailsByItemWarehouseLocation, ProcoreRetainageReleaseInvoices, ProcoreSyncedInvoices, Project Summary With Revised vs Approved CO, Z Project Summary. REST fallback error: Acumatica Payment.ApplicationHistory is not readable from the current Default endpoint, and the safe DocumentsToApply probe did not return historical application lines. Expose a Generic Inquiry or endpoint with payment type/ref, customer, applied invoice type/ref, amount applied, balance, project, and last modified timestamp, then wire payment_applications to that source. ApplicationHistory.AdjustedDocType: View ARPost has BQL delegate
ApplicationHistory.BalanceWriteOff: View ARPost has BQL delegate
ApplicationHistory.BatchNbr: View
